title: Gentle Bounce
instruction: Hold your baby securely and gently bounce to the beat. Keep movements small and rhythmic.

title: Sway & Hum
instruction: Sway side to side with your baby while humming along to the gentle beat.

title: Chime Time
instruction: Let your baby listen to the soft chimes. Watch their face for reactions to the sounds.

title: Knee Ride
instruction: Sit your baby on your knee and gently bounce up and down with the rhythm.

title: Bell Lullaby
instruction: Hold your baby close and let the gentle bells create a calm, rhythmic atmosphere.
